brand_identity.name: BlotQuant
brand_identity.description: Western Blot Band Quantifier — An End-to-End, Hardware-Agnostic Deep Learning Pipeline for Reproducible Protein Expression Analysis.

rules: Use strict grid hierarchy (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
Containers must have 1px solid border (#E2E8F0) and NO soft shadows to maintain a flat, authoritative scientific look.
Data tables and quantitative values MUST use IBM Plex Mono.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards.

surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
surfaces.header: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.inputs: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md text-sm

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Subtle border color darkening and background tinting. Text colors must be explicitly defined on hover.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: High contrast focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2).
interactions_and_motion.loading: Use clear, scientific progress bars or minimal circular spinners. Avoid bouncing animations.

ImageUploadZone.style: Border dashed border-slate-300 bg-slate-50 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:border-primary transition-colors flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 rounded-lg cursor-pointer
ImageUploadZone.typography: Body text for instructions, overline for file limits.
ImageUploadZone.icon: Use a crisp Upload icon from Phosphor Icons.

BandDetectionOverlay.style: Position relative. The uploaded Western blot image is the background. Detected bands have absolute positioned bounding boxes.
BandDetectionOverlay.bounding_box: border-2 border-[#38BDF8] bg-[#38BDF8]/10 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#38BDF8]/20 transition-colors

IntensityBarChart.style: Minimal styling. Bars colored #0F52BA. Show error bars to represent uncertainty quantification. Hide standard grid lines, use only bottom axis.

NormalizationStrategyCard.style: Flat card, 1px border. Use grid for key-value pairs. Values in IBM Plex Mono.

UncertaintyQuantificationTable.style: Dense data table, text-sm, border-b border-slate-200 on rows. Headers in text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase.

AuthenticityScoreGauge.style: Horizontal progress bar or semi-circle gauge. Colors map to score (e.g., >90% Green, <70% Orange/Red).

ResultsJSONExport.style: bg-slate-900 text-slate-50 p-4 rounded-md font-mono text-sm overflow-x-auto relative

PipelineVisualization.style: Flowchart-like horizontal layout with arrows connecting steps (Upload -> Detect -> Quantify -> Output).

SampleGallery.style: Grid of thumbnail images. 1px border. On click, loads into the upload zone.

images.description: Abstract scientific background for hero section or empty states.
images.usage: Use as a very low-opacity background behind the main hero heading or app container.

images.description: Sample Western blot image for the gallery or default state.
images.usage: Use in the Sample Gallery component or as the default placeholder in the Band Detection area.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against backgrounds meets a minimum 4.5:1 ratio (WCAG AA).
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: react-router-dom, framer-motion, recharts, @phosphor-icons/react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Use standard Tailwind classes, do not introduce new CSS files unless necessary.
Build a Dashboard layout: Top fixed header with logo and primary actions. Main content area uses a bento-style or strict grid layout.
The primary flow is Image Upload -> Show Loading State -> Render Dashboard with Analysis Results.
Implement the Band Detection Overlay strictly using relative positioning on the image and absolute positioned divs for the bounding boxes.
The UI must feel like a professional, scientific lab tool—not a flashy consumer app. Avoid heavy shadows and large border-radii. Stick to 1px borders and rounded-md or rounded-lg.
Use mock JSON data for the analysis results to populate the UI (e.g., bands with intensity, molecular weight, uncertainty, normalization factors).
